creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
(In reply to Dries Michiels from comment #2)
I tried two methods to build i2pd - using synth and make from ports.

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for i2pd-2.45.0
_OPTIONS_READ=i2pd-2.45.0
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=AESNI DOCS HARDENING UPNP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=AESNI
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=HARDENING
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=UPNP

In make.conf I wrote:
WITH_DEBUG_PORTS+= security/i2pd

After the second application crash, I built i2pd from source according to their instructions from github.

### Building the application from source

binary=/usr/local/bin/i2pd
[ -e "$binary.old2" ] && { rm "$binary.old2"; mv "$binary.old" "$binary.old2"; }
[ -e "$binary" ] && { cp -a "$binary" "$binary.old"; }


# pkg install git-tiny
mkdir /tmp/test677 && cd /tmp/test677

git clone https://github.com/PurpleI2P/i2pd.git

cd i2pd
git status
# git checkout openssl
git log --name-status HEAD^..HEAD

gmake
cp -a /tmp/test677/i2pd/i2pd /usr/local/bin/i2pd
ls -l /usr/local/bin/i2pd*

And run:
service i2pd start
